description: Stale-knowledge detection benchmark scenarios for the Fastify repository.

scenarios.description: Projection: summary of fastify.js maintainers authored at v4.26.2. Maintainer list changes between v4.26.2 and v4.28.1 due to new commits by contributors.
Projection: bus-factor report for lib/reply.js authored at v4.26.2. New commits change contributor distribution between X and Y.
Projection: ownership summary for lib/hooks.js authored at v4.26.2. Commit history shifts primary owner between X and Y.
Projection: co-change analysis for lib/validation.js authored at v4.26.2. Co-change partners gain or lose weight between X and Y.
Projection: contributor summary for lib/contentTypeParser.js authored at v4.26.2. New contributor activity between X and Y.
Projection: entity summary for lib/errors.js authored at v4.26.2. Error handling module sees changes between X and Y.
Projection: contributor summary for lib/pluginUtils.js authored at v4.26.2. Plugin utilities module sees activity between X and Y.
Projection: ownership summary for package.json authored at v4.26.2. The package.json file has a stable owner across both tags — projection should remain fresh.
Projection: bus-factor report for lib/logger.js authored at v4.26.2. Logger module has a single dominant contributor that does not change between X and Y.
Projection: entity summary for test/types/index.test-d.ts authored at v4.26.2. Type test file sees minimal churn — projection stays accurate between X and Y.
